description_long: This handbag features a structured, rectangular body with rounded edges and a firm silhouette. The exterior is adorned with vertical stripes in varying shades of pink, cream, and subtle yellow, giving it a soft, feminine appearance. Two sturdy, short red handles are attached with gold-tone hardware, adding a bold contrast and a touch of elegance. The top of the bag is secured with a gold zipper that runs the full length, ensuring the contents are safely enclosed. The sides of the bag are solid with the same striped pattern, and the zipper is accentuated by a decorative stitched pull tab. The overall design is both practical and stylish, suitable for urban environments and daily use.
description: A structured, striped handbag with red handles, gold hardware, and a full-length zipper closure. The design is both elegant and practical, featuring vertical pink and cream stripes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the striped pattern, two red handles, and gold hardware attachments.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rounded end, vertical stripes, and the full-length gold zipper with a stitched pull tab.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the same striped pattern and handle arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the rounded end, zipper, and handle attachment.
attribute_strap_type: Two short, fixed handles made of red leather, attached with gold hardware; not adjustable and designed for hand or forearm carry.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Full-length gold zipper located at the top of the bag, with a stitched pull tab for easy opening and closing.
attribute_decorative_elements: Gold-tone hardware and stitched zipper pull tab; no additional decorative elements.
attribute_pattern: Vertical stripes in pink, cream, and yellow tones.
